issue.message: Call requires API level 23 (current min is 21): `schedule`
Call requires API level 23 (current min is 21): `schedule`
Call requires API level 26 (current min is 21): `createChannel`
`android:forceDarkAllowed` requires API level 29 (current min is 21)
`android:forceDarkAllowed` requires API level 29 (current min is 21)
`android:forceDarkAllowed` requires API level 29 (current min is 21)
`android:windowLayoutInDisplayCutoutMode` requires API level 27 (current min is 21)
`android:windowLayoutInDisplayCutoutMode` requires API level 27 (current min is 21)
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Attribute `targetCellWidth` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 21)
Attribute `targetCellHeight` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 21)

Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Did you mean "DQEBBAUAMIGUMQswCQYDVQQGEwJVUzETMBEGA!" instead of "DQEBBAUAMIGUMQswCQYDVQQGEwJVUzETMBEGA1"?
Did you mean "GA!" instead of "GA1"?
Did you mean "GaGBmqSBlzCBlDELMAkGA!" instead of "GaGBmqSBlzCBlDELMAkGA1"?

Did you mean "jggkA!" instead of "jggkA1"?
Did you mean "pYTEWMBQGA!" instead of "pYTEWMBQGA1"?
Did you mean "xlIEluYzEUMBIGA!" instead of "xlIEluYzEUMBIGA1"?
Did you mean "IHOf!" instead of "IHOf1"?
Did you mean "nczEOMAwGA!" instead of "nczEOMAwGA1"?
Did you mean "nczEOMAwGA!" instead of "nczEOMAwGA1"?
Did you mean "ybmlhMRYwFAYDVQQHEw!" instead of "ybmlhMRYwFAYDVQQHEw1"?
Did you mean "ybmlhMRYwFAYDVQQHEw!" instead of "ybmlhMRYwFAYDVQQHEw1"?
